decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: Privacy Policy - MP3 CutterPrivacy PolicyThis privacy policy governs your use of the software applicationMP3 Cutter(“Application”) for mobile devices that was created by beka with package name com.beka.tools.mp3cutter. The Application is able to trim your mp3 song and use it as your ringtone, alarm, notification tone or music. Beside using the song as tone, the application also able to share the song to other by using standard share library from the operating system. The application also able to merge multiple song into one file, however this feature is limited to mp3 file format.

heading_content_part: 4. ChildrenWe do not use the Application to knowingly solicit data from or market to children under the age of 13. If a parent or guardian becomes aware that his or her child has provided us with information without their consent, he or she should contact us atid.beka@gmail.com. We will delete such information from our files within a reasonable time.
